name: Indo Rama Synthetics (India) Limited
summary: Indo Rama Synthetics (India) Limited manufactures and supplies polyester in India, Indonesia, Thailand, the United States, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Turkey. The company offers various polyester products, including polyester staple fiber, polyester filament yarn, draw texturized yarn, fully drawn yarn, and textile grade chips. Its products are used in various applications, such as apparel and sportswear, home furnishings and textiles, non-woven, and automotive. The company was incorporated in 1986 and is based in Gurugram, India.
